# Quaray Formation

**Summary**: A carbonate member in the Midyan Basin.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015]] analyzed the Wadi Waqb Member as an isolated and attached carbonate platform.

## Depositional Environment

- [[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015]] isolated and attached carbonate platforms

## Diagenetic History

- [[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015]] extensive dolomitization, especially in the Wadi Waqb location.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Wadi Waqb member is characterized by a variety of lithofacies including oolitic grainstones, bioclastic packstones, and rudstones. ([[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015, p. 68]])
